stock.title: Stock AI
stock.hero_desc: Stock Picks · Portfolio Check · Golden Cross
stock.hero_warn: For reference only, not investment advice
stock.holding_prompt: Search for your stock and enter cost price for diagnosis:
stock.reject_unrealistic:
I cannot guarantee any profit. There are no 100% winning trades in the stock market. Short-term trading carries extremely high risk.

Keep positions under 30% of total capital and strictly follow stop-loss discipline.
stock.out_of_scope:
I'm a beginner-friendly assistant for A-share short-term trading (1-5 trading days). I cannot provide advice for HK stocks, US stocks, futures, crypto, or long-term investing.

Try:
• Enter a sector name for short-term opportunities
• Enter a stock code for diagnosis
• Ask about today's market conditions
stock.off_topic:
I'm a stock trading assistant and can only answer stock-related questions.

Try:
• Enter a sector name for opportunities
• Enter a stock code for diagnosis
• Ask about today's market
• Paste news for analysis
stock.stock_not_found: Could not find stock "{{name}}". Please check the name or code.
stock.example_0: Any short-term opportunities in AI computing?
stock.example_2: How's the market today, good time to trade?
stock.example_3: Any semiconductor stocks worth watching today?

spin.min_options: At least 2 options needed for the wheel

0.message: Today's the day to act bold — stop overthinking

1.message: Your gut is spot on — trust it

3.message: Every choice you make today is right

4.message: Pick the pricier one — you're worth it

6.message: A quick thought is enough — don't overthink

7.message: Pick the one that makes you smile

8.message: Your friend's advice is gold today

9.message: Both are great — go with the cheaper one

10.message: Follow the reviews — they won't lie

11.message: Today's perfect for trying something new

12.message: When in doubt, pick the healthier option

13.message: Your decision-making is sharper than usual

14.message: Pick what future-you will thank you for

15.message: Head and heart agree today — go for it

16.message: Either way works — you can't lose

18.message: The classic choice is the safest bet

20.message: Good day for small picks — save big ones

21.message: Ask yourself: will I still want this in 3 days?

22.message: List the pros and cons before choosing

23.message: Luck is average today — play it steady

24.message: Comparison shopping pays off big today

25.message: Out with the old, in with the new — but don't toss blindly

26.message: Pick the one you can return — keep your options

27.message: Sleep on it — there's no rush

29.message: The best pick within budget is good enough

30.message: Today's choices may bring regret — tread carefully

31.message: Don't let discounts cloud your judgment

32.message: Don't buy yet — go home and think

33.message: Not a good day for big decisions

34.message: Decision paralysis day — just flip a coin

35.message: Gut feeling is off today — ask around

37.message: Once you pick, don't look back

38.message: Best not to buy anything today

39.message: Every choice will torment you — just chill

examples.0: Hotpot or BBQ? Can't decide all afternoon
examples.1: Order takeout or cook at home?
examples.2: Full sugar or light sugar boba?
examples.3: Sichuan or Japanese with friends this weekend?
examples.4: Buy the new game or wait for a sale?
examples.5: Binge watch or sleep early tonight?
examples.6: This outfit is pricey — should I buy it?
examples.7: New season clothes or dig out last year's?
examples.9: Sneakers or heels for going out?
examples.10: Rush hour — taxi or squeeze into the subway?
examples.11: Holiday trip — popular spot or hidden gem?
examples.12: Unhappy at work — quit now or line up something first?
examples.13: Work overtime or leave on time and chill?
examples.14: Should I sign up for a weekend class?
examples.15: Gym membership or home workout videos?
examples.16: Diet salad tonight or eat normally and start tomorrow?
examples.17: Go to the friends gathering or recharge at home?
examples.18: Old pillow still works but should I upgrade?
examples.19: Keep watching this show or switch to the higher rated one?

decision.title: Decision Personality Test
decision.subtitle: Discover your decision-making style
decision.q0: A friend suddenly asks "What should we eat tonight?" Your first reaction?
decision.q0_b: Open a review app to check ratings
decision.q0_d: Hold on, let me make a shortlist
decision.q1: You found two similar items online shopping. You would?
decision.q1_b: Buy both, return what does not fit
decision.q1_c: Check size charts and buyer reviews first
decision.q1_d: Ask a friend which looks better
decision.q2: The day before a trip and you have no plan. You would?
decision.q2_a: No plan is the best plan! Just go!
decision.q2_b: Stay up all night making a perfect itinerary
decision.q2_c: Ask a friend who has been there for tips
decision.q2_d: Set a general direction, figure out details later
decision.q3: Menu has a new item and a classic favorite. You pick?
decision.q3_c: Check what others at nearby tables ordered
decision.q3_d: Ask the waiter for a recommendation
decision.q4: A friend invites you to an activity you have never tried. You?
decision.q4_d: See if anyone I know is going too
decision.q5: A group is deciding on lunch. Your role is?
decision.q5_a: Wait quietly for others to decide
decision.q5_b: Suggest 2-3 options and let everyone vote
decision.q5_c: Read the room and pick something everyone can agree on
decision.q5_d: Just decide: We are eating here!
decision.q6: Flash sale ends in 10 minutes. You would?
decision.q6_a: Buy now! This deal won't come back
decision.q6_b: Think calmly whether I really need it
decision.q6_c: Quickly search if there is a better deal
decision.q6_d: Share it with friends to split the order
decision.q7: Facing a big life decision (new job, new city), you usually?
decision.q7_a: Follow my gut, go for it once decided
decision.q7_b: Hesitate a long time, never feel ready enough
decision.q7_c: Make detailed pros and cons lists
decision.q7_d: Talk to people who have been through it
decision.p_flash_desc: Instinct player, decides in three seconds
decision.p_flash_fallback: You are the ultimate action-taker. Speed is your superpower. Sure, you stumble sometimes, but that is life!
decision.p_strategist_desc: No data, no decision. Spreadsheets are your best friend
decision.p_strategist_fallback: You are the most reliable analyst on the team. Every decision is backed by evidence. Just sometimes you miss the window without realizing it.
decision.p_gambler_desc: High risk, high reward. Life is one big bet
decision.p_gambler_fallback: Bold and daring is your brand. You do not win every time, but your guts are truly admirable.
decision.p_democrat_desc: Even personal decisions need a group meeting
decision.p_democrat_fallback: You value everyone's opinion and are a natural mediator. But sometimes you should listen to your own heart too.
decision.p_perfectionist_desc: Would rather not choose than choose wrong
decision.p_perfectionist_fallback: Your pursuit of quality is admirable. Just remember, perfect is sometimes the enemy of good enough.
decision.p_zen_fallback: You live with clarity, free from choice anxiety. That ease is rare and precious in this fast-paced world.

investor.title: Investor Personality Test
investor.subtitle: What is your investing style?
investor.q0: How long do you prefer to hold stocks?
investor.q0_d: Depends on mood — sell when it rises
investor.q1: Before buying a stock, what matters most?
investor.q2: Your stock drops 10%. Your first reaction?
investor.q2_b: Buy more! It is cheaper now
investor.q2_d: Ignore it, hold for the long term
investor.q3: How often do you check your portfolio?
investor.q4: Market surges and you have no position. You?
investor.q4_b: Stay calm, wait for a pullback
investor.q4_d: Observe for a few days first
investor.q5: Which investing approach do you prefer?
investor.q5_a: Short-term trading, quick in and out
investor.q6_a: Sell too — if everyone is running, so am I
investor.q6_c: Calmly analyze if it is a buying opportunity
investor.q6_d: Keep holding, the market will recover
investor.q7_b: A few short trades per week is enough
investor.q7_c: Just do not lose money and I am happy
investor.p_daytrader_desc: Quick in and out, intraday operations
investor.p_daytrader_fallback: You are a market hunter with sharp eyes and decisive moves. Trading fees are your biggest enemy.
investor.p_buffett_fallback: You have Buffett's patience and vision. Time is your best friend. Occasional dips are just scenery along the way.
investor.p_quant_fallback: You are the engineer of investing — data and models do the talking. But remember, black swans do not follow indicators.
investor.p_zen_investor_desc: Regular contributions, no chart-watching, peace of mind
investor.p_zen_investor_fallback: You have found the truth of investing: time + compound interest = freedom. Just keep relaxing.
investor.p_allrounder_desc: Flexible and adaptive to any market condition
investor.p_allrounder_fallback: You are a market veteran who has seen bulls and bears. Your biggest strength is adaptability; your biggest risk is overconfidence.
investor.p_news_trader_fallback: Your information sensitivity is top-notch, always catching market trends first. But watch out for fake news.
